description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with light-colored exterior walls and a flat, tiled ground surface. The front is defined by a blue awning supported by white columns, creating a shaded porch area. To the side, there are two circular planters with green foliage and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. A large tree and a stone well are positioned adjacent to the building, adding natural and functional elements to the setting. The rear and side walls are solid, with minimal openings, emphasizing privacy. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A single-story bungalow with light walls, a blue awning porch, planters, a tree, and a stone well on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue awning porch, two planters, the entrance, and the stone well with a tree nearby.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tree, stone well, and the blue awning extending from the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall with minimal features and one planter visible over the wall.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the blue awning, planters, and a glimpse of the interior seating area.
